channel.title: Global Sanctions News (Custom RSS)
channel.description: Auto-generated feed from rendered Global Sanctions news list

item.title: US begins tariff investigation into German pharmaceutical trading practices
item.description: The US Trade Representative has begun an investigation under s301 of the Trade Act 1974 to determine whether Germany’s “persistent underpayment for innovative pharmaceutical products is unreasonable o

item.title: UK parliament briefing on seizing Russian shadow fleet
item.description: The UK House of Commons Library has published a research briefing on seizing sanctioned Russian vessels. These vessels are part of Russia's 'shadow fleet' – vessels which are said to be used to circum

item.title: US begins process to impose visa restrictions on Tigray People’s Liberation Front members
item.description: The US has begun the process to impose visa restrictions on hardline members of the Tigray People’s Liberation Front. The TPLF is a paramilitary group based in Ethiopia, which the US says undermines p

item.title: US adds Hizballah-linked officials to counterterrorism sanctions list
item.description: The US has added 3 people and 5 entities linked to Hizballah to its EO 13224 counterterrorism sanctions list – press release. Sleiman Antoine Frangie is the leader of the Lebanese Marada Movement

item.title: UK amends Lukoil International general licence
item.description: The UK has amended general licence INT/2025/8031092, which allows UK people and entities to continue transacting with Lukoil’s German subsidiary despite UK sanctions on Lukoil – publication notice.

item.title: US issues updated and new Venezuela general licences
item.description: The US has issued 2 updated Venezuela-related general licences and 1 new GL authorising the supply of items and services to Venezuela’s largest airline. GL 5X authorises certain transactions rela

item.title: European court rejects 3 Belarusian delisting appeals
item.description: The Court of Justice of the European Union has dismissed 3 appeals against General Court judgments which rejected annulment applications brought by Belaruskali AAT, its director-general Ivan Golovaty

item.title: Memorandum of understanding between US and Iran includes sanctions relief
item.description: A preliminary memorandum of understanding for an end to the conflict between the US and Iran was signed on 17 June 2026, following the parties’ agreement to draft a deal. Both sides will have 60 days

item.title: US charges 1 person with sanctions evasion
item.description: The US has charged a San Diego resident with sanctions evasion for sending money to Hamas and a Hamas fundraising organisation. Reda Sabassi is charged with conspiring to breach the International Emer

item.title: US reaches settlement agreement with Bosch over unlawful exports to Huawei
item.description: The US Bureau of Industry and Security (BIS) has reached a $36,184,680 settlement agreement with Robert Bosch GmbH (Bosch), a technology company headquartered in Germany, over 109 breaches of the Expo
